scripts.copy-printers: node -e "const fs=require('fs');const path=require('path');const src=path.join(process.cwd(),'..','assets','printers');const dest=path.join(process.cwd(),'public','printers');if(fs.existsSync(src)){fs.mkdirSync(dest,{recursive:true});for(const f of fs.readdirSync(src)){fs.copyFileSync(path.join(src,f),path.join(dest,f));}console.log('Imagens das impressoras copiadas para public/printers');}else{console.warn('Pasta assets/printers não encontrada. Crie web/public/printers e copie as imagens manualmente.');}"
scripts.build: npm run copy-printers && tsc -b && vite build
